```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
```

## Load the converter

```{r}
source("flora_converter.R")
```

# load data convert
```{r}
data <- csv_to_flora_json("flora.csv")
df   <- flora_json_to_df(data)
head(df)
summary(df)

check <- df %>%
  group_by(doi_o) %>%
  filter(n() > 1) %>% 
  select(doi_o,doi_r,apa_ref_r) %>%
  ungroup

View(check)
```
